raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Strengthening this passage centrally involves reframing the contribution and causal-estimation claim so the core thesis is more defensible.","R1.2":"The delegation implicates checking whether the argument from paired outcomes, predictive accuracy, thresholding, and optimality actually follows.","R1.3":"The artifact makes empirical and methodological claims that need to be aligned with the reported metrics and experimental setup.","R1.6":"A request to make a draft stronger centrally includes improving sentence-level force, clarity, concision, and register.","RX.1":"Any projected strengthening should preserve uncertainty around causal claims, optimality, and empirical generalization.","RX.2":"The passage contains strong claims such as uniqueness and robustness, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.","RX.3":"The task is to strengthen the writing rather than execute experiments, add unsupported results, or perform unrelated review.","RX.4":"Inflated claims about cost-optimal deployment or robustness could mislead downstream users of model-routing systems.","RX.5":"Changes would need to remain traceable to the stated setup, metrics, and causal assumptions in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: Strengthening this passage centrally involves reframing the contribution and causal-estimation claim so the core thesis is more defensible.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation implicates checking whether the argument from paired outcomes, predictive accuracy, thresholding, and optimality actually follows.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes empirical and methodological claims that need to be aligned with the reported metrics and experimental setup.
rationale.R1.6: A request to make a draft stronger centrally includes improving sentence-level force, clarity, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected strengthening should preserve uncertainty around causal claims, optimality, and empirical generalization.
rationale.RX.2: The passage contains strong claims such as uniqueness and robustness, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The task is to strengthen the writing rather than execute experiments, add unsupported results, or perform unrelated review.
rationale.RX.4: Inflated claims about cost-optimal deployment or robustness could mislead downstream users of model-routing systems.
rationale.RX.5: Changes would need to remain traceable to the stated setup, metrics, and causal assumptions in the artifact.
